description: Large list in two columns, covering both recto and verso. In Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Giving names of houses, their owners or tenants, numbers, and the word ṣaḥḥa/ṣuḥḥa next to each entry. List of houses and their owners or tenants, On verso there is the note nusikha fī dīwān al-majlis. Verso contains the very beginnings of four lines of majuscule—this is a reused chancery petition. Cited in Rabie, Financial System of Egypt 144, 198.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
